mapper.select: SELECT id AS productId, price, status FROM products WHERE id = #{productId}
SELECT id AS productOptionId, stock FROM product_options WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND stock > 0 ORDER BY expire_date ASC, id ASC FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchases ( user_id, product_id, quantity, purchase_price, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{purchasePrice}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
INSERT INTO purchase_product_options ( purchase_id, product_option_id, quantity, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{purchaseId}, #{productOptionId}, #{quantity}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
